decoder.name: huawei-ac-radius-authen
decoder.regex: ^\s*(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}) AgileController %%01RADIUSLOG/\d+/AUTHENTICATION\(\w\):\s+The user authentication (\w+)\.\s+user="([^"]*)" ip="([^"]*)" ipv6="([^"]*)" radiusclientip="([^"]*)" time="[^"]*" mac="([^"]*)" apmac="([^"]*)" authenrule="([^"]*)" authorrule="([^"]*)" errorcode="([^"]*)" radiusClientSysName="([^"]*)"
decoder.order: ac_event_time, ac_auth_result, dstuser, srcip, srcip_v6, radius_client_ip, mac, ap_mac, authen_rule, author_rule, error_code, switch_name

decoder.name: huawei-ac-radius-logon
decoder.regex: ^\s*(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}) AgileController %%01RADIUSLOG/\d+/LOGONOROFF\(\w\):\s+The user log was (?:created|deleted)\.\s+user="([^"]*)" userName="([^"]*)" ip="([^"]*)" ipv6="([^"]*)" radiusclientip="([^"]*)" msgtype="([^"]*)" time="[^"]*" mac="([^"]*)" apmac="([^"]*)"
decoder.order: ac_event_time, dstuser, username, srcip, srcip_v6, radius_client_ip, ac_msg_type, mac, ap_mac

decoder.name: huawei-ac-portal-logon
decoder.regex: ^\s*(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}) AgileController %%01PORTALLOG/\d+/LOGONOROFF\(\w\):\s+The user log was (?:created|deleted)\.\s+user="([^"]*)" hostname="([^"]*)" ip="([^"]*)" ipv6="([^"]*)" logtype="([^"]*)" authtype="([^"]*)" time="[^"]*" mac="([^"]*)" result="([^"]*)"
decoder.order: ac_event_time, dstuser, hostname, srcip, srcip_v6, ac_log_type, ac_auth_type, mac, ac_result
